Bash(python3.11 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

new_cell_source = \(
    "# =============================================================\\n"
    "# 8 - Peuplement de l'ontologie OWL Back2speaK\\n"
    "#\\n"
    "# Cette cellule fait le lien entre les resultats du pipeline\\n"
    "# et l'ontologie OWL utilisee dans Protege.\\n"
    "#\\n"
    "# Ce qu'elle fait :\\n"
    "#   1. Charge l'ontologie de base \(ontologie.owx\)\\n"
    "#   2. Pour chaque fichier audio avec erreur\(s\) sur /ch/ :\\n"
    "#      - Cree le patient \(s'il n'existe pas encore\)\\n"
    "#      - Cree le phoneme de travail avec sa position\\n"
    "#      - Enregistre les phonemes voisins \(voyelle precedente/suivante\)\\n"
    "#      - Cree l'exercice avec le niveau et le taux de reussite reels\\n"
    "#   3. Sauvegarde l'ontologie enrichie -> ontologie_peuplee.owl\\n"
    "#\\n"
    "# Prerequis : owlready2 installe \(pip install owlready2\)\\n"
    "# =============================================================\\n"
    "\\n"
    "import sys, os\\n"
    "\\n"
    "# Chemin vers le dossier ontologie/ \(relatif a ce notebook\)\\n"
    "ONTOLOGIE_DIR = os.path.join\(os.getcwd\(\), 'ontologie'\)\\n"
    "if ONTOLOGIE_DIR not in sys.path:\\n"
    "    sys.path.insert\(0, ONTOLOGIE_DIR\)\\n"
    "\\n"
    "from src.pipeline_bridge import \(\\n"
    "    populate_ontology_from_notebook,\\n"
    "    export_results_to_json,\\n"
    "\)\\n"
    "\\n"
    "# -- \(Optionnel\) Sauvegarder les resultats en JSON --\\n"
    "# Permet de relancer le peuplement sans relancer le modele IA.\\n"
    "export_results_to_json\(\\n"
    "    results,\\n"
    "    os.path.join\(ONTOLOGIE_DIR, 'output', 'resultats_pipeline.json'\)\\n"
    "\)\\n"
    "\\n"
    "# -- Peupler l'ontologie --\\n"
    "# `results` = liste produite par la cellule 6 \(analyze_audio sur tous les fichiers\)\\n"
    "# `df`      = DataFrame fusionne produit par la cellule 3\\n"
    "populate_ontology_from_notebook\(\\n"
    "    results       = results,\\n"
    "    df            = df,\\n"
    "    ontology_path = os.path.join\(ONTOLOGIE_DIR, 'ontologie.owx'\),\\n"
    "    output_path   = os.path.join\(ONTOLOGIE_DIR, 'output', 'ontologie_peuplee.owl'\),\\n"
    "    only_errors   = True,\\n"
    "    verbose       = True,\\n"
    "\)\\n"
\)

new_cell = {
    "cell_type": "code",
    "execution_count": None,
    "metadata": {},
    "outputs": [],
    "source": new_cell_source,
}

nb_path = "C:/Users/manel/Desktop/events/Datathon/datathon_back2speak/features_extraction_wav2vecFr.ipynb"
with open\(nb_path, encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Remove previously added cell if it exists \(cell 7 is index 7\)
if len\(nb["cells"]\) >= 8 and "Peuplement" in "".join\(nb["cells"][7].get\("source", []\)\):
    nb["cells"][7] = new_cell
    print\("Cellule 8 remplacee."\)
else:
    nb["cells"].append\(new_cell\)
    print\(f"Cellule ajoutee. Total : {len\(nb['cells']\)}"\)

with open\(nb_path, "w", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)

print\("Notebook mis a jour."\)
PYEOF)

from src.pipeline_bridge import populate_ontology_from_notebook, export_results_to_json

# Simuler exactement la structure de `results` produite par analyze_audio\(\)
results = [
    # Fichier incorrect : /ch/ -> /s/ en position finale
    {
        "audio_id":      "P02_S02_W_F01.wav",
        "speaker":       "S02",
        "age":           45,
        "target_word":   "fleche",
        "label":         "substitution_ch_vers_s",
        "reference_ipa": "flEch",
        "produced_ipa":  "flEs",
        "n_sh_errors":   1,
        "success_rate":  0.0,
        "per":           0.25,
        "is_correct":    False,
        "position_du_sh": "Finale",
        "sh_errors": [
            {
                "error_index":   1,
                "error_type":    "substitution",
                "expected":      "sh",
                "produced":      "s",
                "position_label": "final",
                "preceding_vowel": "E",
                "following_vowel": "\(none\)",
                "target_word":   "fleche",
            }
        ],
    },
    # Fichier incorrect : /ch/ -> omis en position initiale
    {
        "audio_id":      "P02_S02_W_I01.wav",
        "speaker":       "S02",
        "age":           45,
        "target_word":   "chat",

        "n_sh_errors":   1,

        "position_du_sh": "Initiale",
        "sh_errors": [
            {
                "error_index":   1,
                "error_type":    "substitution",
                "expected":      "sh",
                "produced":      "s",
                "position_label": "initial",
                "preceding_vowel": "\(none\)",
                "following_vowel": "a",
                "target_word":   "chat",
            }
        ],
    },
    # Fichier correct \(ignoré car only_errors=True\)
    {
        "audio_id":      "P03_S03_W_F02.wav",
        "speaker":       "S03",
        "age":           12,
        "target_word":   "roche",
        "label":         "correct",
        "reference_ipa": "rosh",
        "produced_ipa":  "rosh",
        "n_sh_errors":   0,
        "success_rate":  1.0,
        "per":           0.0,
        "is_correct":    True,

        "sh_errors":     [],
    },
    # Deuxieme fichier S02 en finale -> taux agrege = \(0+0\)/2 = 0%
    {
        "audio_id":      "P02_S02_W_F02.wav",
        "speaker":       "S02",
        "age":           45,
        "target_word":   "roche",
        "label":         "substitution_ch_vers_s",
        "reference_ipa": "rosh",
        "produced_ipa":  "ros",
        "n_sh_errors":   1,
        "success_rate":  0.0,
        "per":           0.33,
        "is_correct":    False,
        "position_du_sh": "Finale",
        "sh_errors": [
            {
                "error_index":   1,
                "error_type":    "substitution",
                "expected":      "sh",
                "produced":      "s",
                "position_label": "final",
                "preceding_vowel": "o",
                "following_vowel": "\(none\)",
                "target_word":   "roche",
            }
        ],
    },
]

# Simuler le DataFrame df \(normalement pandas, ici dict-like\)
class MockDF:
    def __init__\(self, rows\):
        self._rows = rows
    def drop_duplicates\(self, subset=None\):
        seen = set\(\)
        unique = []
        for row in self._rows:
            key = tuple\(str\(row.get\(k,''\)\) for k in \(subset or []\)\)
            if key not in seen:
                seen.add\(key\)
                unique.append\(row\)
        return MockDF\(unique\)
    def iterrows\(self\):
        for i, row in enumerate\(self._rows\):
            yield i, type\('R', \(\), {'get': lambda self,k,d=None,row=row: row.get\(k,d\)}\)\(\)

df_data = [
    {"speaker": "S02", "age": 45, "sexe": "F", "collecteur_id": "P02"},
    {"speaker": "S03", "age": 12, "sexe": "F", "collecteur_id": "P02"},
]
df = MockDF\(df_data\)

# Lancer le peuplement
pop = populate_ontology_from_notebook\(
    results=results,
    df=df,
    ontology_path="C:/Users/manel/Desktop/events/Datathon/datathon_back2speak/ontologie/ontologie.owx",
    output_path="C:/Users/manel/Desktop/events/Datathon/datathon_back2speak/ontologie/output/ontologie_peuplee.owl",
    only_errors=True,
    verbose=True,
\)

# Verifier les taux de reussite
for exo in pop.onto.ExoEnCours.instances\(\):
    print\(f"  ExoEnCours: {exo.name} | niveau={exo.aNiveau} | taux={exo.aTauxReussite}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3.11 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

# Verifier que le fichier OWL est valide et lisible par owlready2
from owlready2 import get_ontology

onto = get_ontology\(
    "C:/Users/manel/Desktop/events/Datathon/datathon_back2speak/ontologie/output/ontologie_peuplee.owl"
\).load\(\)

print\("=== Contenu de ontologie_peuplee.owl ==="\)
print\(\)
print\("Classes :", [c.name for c in onto.classes\(\)]\)
print\(\)
print\("Patients :", [i.name for i in onto.Patient.instances\(\)]\)
print\(\)
print\("ExoEnCours :"\)
for exo in onto.ExoEnCours.instances\(\):
    cats = [c.name for c in exo.aCategorieMots]
    print\(f"  {exo.name}: niveau={exo.aNiveau} taux={exo.aTauxReussite} cats={cats}"\)
print\(\)
print\("phTravail :"\)
for ph in onto.phTravail.instances\(\):
    prec = [p.name for p in ph.aPrecedent]
    suiv = [s.name for s in ph.aSuivant]
    print\(f"  {ph.name}: position={ph.aPosition} type={ph.aTypeTravail} prec={prec} suiv={suiv}"\)
print\(\)
print\("CategorieMot :"\)
for cat in onto.CategorieMot.instances\(\):
    phonemes = [p.name for p in cat.aPhoneme]
    print\(f"  {cat.name}: phonemes={phonemes}"\)
print\(\)
print\("Liaisons Patient->Exercice :"\)
for p in onto.Patient.instances\(\):
    exercices = [e.name for e in p.pratique]
    print\(f"  {p.name} pratique {exercices}"\)
PYEOF)
